Language strings, font metadata, and Dutch translations for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[lang_map.json](lang_map.json.md)**: Defines language strings and font metadata for the Dutch locale in JSON format.
- **[tintin.po](tintin.po.md)**: Dutch translations for Pebble firmware strings, including months, days, and various UI elements.
